src/main/java/com/javaweb/App.java.general_idea: Replace deprecated Locale constructor with the new factory method introduced in Java 21.
src/main/java/com/javaweb/App.java.why_exists: The Locale(String, String) constructor is deprecated for removal in Java 21, and the new Locale.of(String, String) method is the preferred replacement to ensure forward compatibility and adhere to modern API standards.
